reviews.comments: Beautiful place and would definitely stay again!
Peaceful cozy feel. Home is nice and private. Avant and Connie were nice and helpful. The ambiance was perfect. Will definitely recommend and most definitely keep in mind. Thank you.
Best Bang for buck! Nice private lodge with a great view of the stars

Amazing stay. The house is very cute and so well equipped. Super clean, it felt really like home. The hot tub was also very nice after a long day of hiking and super fun disco ball. The location is great, very near Mariposa town and 1h drive to Yosemite. We had a great time there and recommend it!

I like the amenities that were provided in the airbnb. The airbnb is equipped with updated equipment that we found enjoyable such as a bidet, outdoor patio, and the kitchen. It felt like home and the area outside was beautiful. The trees were amazing and you can see the stars at night.

Great little get away cabin. We only stayed one day but everything was clean and matched the listing. Our host was responsive with easy check in and out. Everything in the cabin was well marked with directions for use. Nice location, about 15 minutes drive to the town but quiet and beautiful location.

Perfect spot for our visit to Yosemite NP. We appreciated Avand’s flexibility to come a day early when our plans changed.  The cabin, which is nestled in the woods, had everything we needed.   The hot tub was the icing on the cake.  Highly recommend

Fantastic place! We were able to get the “cabin in the woods” vibe without the usual accompanying feeling that we’re in a scary movie. The amenities were amazing, and it’s very obvious the hosts put a lot of thought and effort into the listing. The drive to Yosemite was only about an hour, and it was beautiful. Close enough to town to get supplies but far enough to enjoy the quiet. I would recommend this place to anyone!

Avand’s place was perfect for a Yosemite getaway. We stayed with two dogs and enjoyed the privacy and very well appointed cabin. There was a minor innocence at check in but he quickly offered solutions to rectify the situation. Overall the cabin was very comfortable, we would stay again if back in town.
Great stay , as advertised, the hot tub was amazing . Being in the hot tub at night watching the stars come was was great!

Super cute Airbnb, we’d 100% stay here again. Our pup was obsessed with the backyard 🐾
There is another Airbnb on the property (I didn’t realize that when I first booked), but honestly it didn’t affect our stay at all.
We stayed at Avands place with our dogs. Was such a great experience for a quick 2 day get away. Cabin had all the amenities and was just what we needed. We will be staying here on our next get away!
Amazing
Exactly as pictured. Enjoyed the hot tub very much in the morning.
This was a perfect peaceful stay in mountains.   There was a hot tub out back that was a highlight for us.   Easy scenic drive to Yosemite for us.
We absolutely loved staying here and would definitely stay again! Avand was extremely helpful and his place definitely felt like home!
Peaceful stay right outside of Yosemite. The home is well taken care of.
Absolutely fantastic stay!!
Very nice cabin in the woods close to Yosemite national Park and very intimate experience nice outdoor area and all around just a great place to book
Amazing place to stay! As a college student this was a great affordable place to stay
The cabin was beautiful! Very relaxing. Perfect if you want a quiet romantic getaway!
Highly recommend!
Gorgeous cabin, loved the captions and tips throughout they were so funny and thoughtful. We loved every second of our stay there, thank you!

Great visit…love the house.  Wish we were here longer in warmer weather to enjoy the outdoor kitchen.  There were lots of nice touches: q-tips, bird clock, bed was comfy, zip lock bags, hot tub, REAL plants …. All good. Again, we had a great time and loved the cabin.
beautiful place in a peaceful surrounding close enough to drive to Yosemite. Has everything you need to relax and enjoy your stay. Highly recommend.
It was wonderful !!!!!

We had a great stay at the cabin. It’s so beautiful and peaceful. We had a family of deer come visit one evening, which was amazing. The cabin is just as described and we’d definitely stay there again.
This BNB was beautiful and the perfect peaceful getaway while we visited Yosemite.  Everything was as listed and very relaxing.  We look forward to staying in the future.

This Airbnb was perfect for our weekend getaway! It had everything we needed and was very spacious! The shared backyard is super cute with an outdoor kitchen, hammock, and hot tub. Would definitely stay there again!
Our stay was incredible! The hot tub was awesome to have in the evenings after Yosemite.

Very lovely & peaceful place. Had everything we could need, and most importantly, a comfortable king sized bed. (I’ve stayed in a LOT of Air bnbs, & this can absolutely ruin an otherwise great experience.) :)
We stayed during an unusually hot weekend, so didn’t get to take advantage of the hot tub or outdoor kitchen, but hopefully we can return another time. It’s a really neat set up!
Our favorite local spots were Sierra Cider (very close!), The Grove, & Sticks Coffee in Mariposa; and South Gate Brewing in Oakhurst.
We also took our dogs to Briceburg one day, and spent our last day in Yosemite on the paved, dog friendly trails.
Avand is an excellent host!
Nice peaceful stay

omg, this place is so goooood, my family love it. and we saw star sky and deer family when we came there. i real recommend this place if anyone need it. and owner is too sweet to remind us dont be late to be there. eveything is wonderful.

We had such a great time at this Airbnb!!! It’s beautifully decorated & has all the essentials + more. The hosts were super friendly & helpful :) would love to stay here again next time we plan a Yosemite trip!
Great place, would stay again!

Beautiful, warm, relaxing home! We stayed a few days to explore Yosemite. We fell in love with this home and its decor.  The kitchen was well equipped. We enjoyed the bbq. The bed was comfortable. We got a kick out of the notes left around for instructions written with a sense of humor. The host was responsive and proactive about potential issues. Would love to come back!

Loved this stay! The Airbnb is about an hour and a half from Yosemite valley and two hours from Tuolumne meadows. There’s not a ton of housing between Mariposa and the park (aside from a few hotels), so all things considered, this was a great location. Avand was very communicative which was appreciated. The hot tub was great after long days of hiking. Overall, loved it here.

We loved Avand’s space. Great mix of quiet home and things to do in the backyard area. Hot tub, outdoor seating, grill area and outdoor cooking space were excellent. Very comformtable beds, plenty of linens and towels, and kitchen was fully built out with any needed amenity.
Quick 15-min drive to downtown Mariposa made dinners and grocery runs easy, with a ton of privacy. Sunset was awesome.
We loved our stay at Avand’s and will definitely plan to stay here again when we come back to Yosemite.

Great AirBnb to stay in - we loved the vibe, has all the necessary things, super cool patio in the back unfortunately we did not get to use due to timing. Host was proactive and attentive; definitely will be back!

Staying at Avand and Connie’s place was the perfect babymoon location away from city life. We loved how quiet it was and being nudged on a hilltop away from the main road made all the difference. It wasn’t too hot while we stayed, maybe 90 for one day, but the AC kept the whole place nice n cool. We would’ve liked having access to the pantry in the kitchen, but just didn’t wanna ask cause I’m sure most people bother her with that question a lot. We got to see a family of deer pass through one morning in the backyard so keep your eyes open for some wildlife! King size bed was perfect!!! Very accommodating for our dog, he loved chasing the lizards in the backyard.
The Mariposa Cabin was a great spot for exploring Yosemite and returning to an air-conditioned cozy place. We grilled steaks, we hot-tubbed, and slept peacefully.

We had a wonderful stay! I forgot contact lens solution and brought no extra contacts and i was so impressed to find a bottle of solution under the sink. Saved my eyes and my trip! The cabin is very well thought out in terms of guests feeling like at home for sure. Appreciate the thoughtfulness
Everything was perfect ,definitely exceeded our expectations. Highly recommend this place,will definitely be back again in the future.

We planned a week experiencing Yosemite. This was an excellent spot, thought required some driving into the park. We found the 140 route more enjoyable with the last 20 or so miles along the Merced River into the West entrance of the park. The cabin was perfect for my wife and I. Secluded and quiet, but with places to eat if you choose to eat out in nearby Mariposa or Oakhurst. We chose to cook each evening and the kitchen or outdoor grill was perfect. Everything you needed to cook was available.... My wife and I enjoy visiting all the National Parks, but if we re-visit Yosemite, we will definitely seek out this jem of a place.
Everything was perfect! Thanks!!
Lovely and homey cabin that made us feel right at home. Everything that we needed was there and the grill outside was ready for use. Nice getaway from the city and was quiet and peaceful.

This Airbnb was a great place to decompress and relax in after multiple days of hiking! The hot tub out in the back is a plus for your achy joints after hiking all day. The location is peaceful and only a 20 minute drive to downtown Mariposa where all the restaurants and shops are. They accommodated both of our dogs which was a huge plus. We had a wonderful stay and would definitely book again!

We loved the cabin! Such a beautiful area and cool space. We loved the way the interior was designed and even bought one of the pieces of local art! We would absolutely stay here again, and it was perfect proximity for our trip to Yosemite. Thank you for everything.
This is our second time staying here and we forward to many more vacations to come at Avand's. Thank you again!

Nanook and I have stayed in many Airbnb’s since I retired and started traveling, this was “hand’s down” the best! Everything was as described and perfect. The king bed was so comfortable and I made use of the bbq and disco lights. 😀 I felt at home. We explored Yosemite during the day and relaxed at home at night. I wanted to reserve a few nights more nights but I was too late. 😩 I made use of that great kitchen. Highly recommend and Nanook and I will be back. It was nice meeting Connie.

The cabin felt homey for our week there.  I was a big fan of the kitchen setup and my boyfriend enjoyed the outdoor bbq setup.  The hot tub was nice and needed after long days of hiking.  It was a nice drive to Yosemite each morning along the river.  Highly recommend! Also appreciated the coffee set up!
We loved the time we spent here! It was very cozy and has lots of amenities. Very comfortable and everything is perfect. I would love to stay here again.

This was comfortable stay around 1h-1h15m from Yosemite Valley. The bed was extremely comfortable and we had several great nights rest. The entire place is spotless. There are also useful amenities such as coffee machine, washing machine etc. checkin was also very straightforward
A lovely place to stay and rest during visiting Yosemite. I recommand !

Loved our stay. Cabin is beautifully decorated. The beds are comfy. The outdoor kitchen was awesome as well as the disco ball and hammock. Cabin is super clean as well. Check out Sierra Cider up the  street. If going to Yosemite, leave early, we got to the gates by 6 AM and not a soul in sight. Super peaceful for your first hike of the day without the crowds. Would definitely stay here again. Thank you!!

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay! Avand was super helpful and accommodating & his place met all our expectations.
Some highlights for me were the disco ball in the back patio/kitchenette area, the hot tub and the hammock & the bidet lol. And of course the constant sound of frogs and crickets :)
We also had some turkey friends that visited daily.
The location is an easy drive to downtown mariposa with a bunch of great little restaurants, grocery stores and shops. And a beautiful 50min-1hr drive to Yosemite!
Highly recommend & would stay again!
Great shower pressure and plenty of cooking utensils

Great time!
About 1hr30 from Yosemite, but having the town of Mariposa close by was so nice. The hot tub was the best after hiking :)

We had a blissful 6-days of complete R&R. Everything met or exceeded our expectations - there were no surprises. And when the power went out for about 6 hours during a heavy snowstorm, Avand made sure we were minimally, if at all, inconvenienced.
Loved staying here. Everything was easy to understand and operate. Great access to Yosemite and Mariposa. Loved the hot tub and outdoor amenities.

Me and my partner really fell in love with the place and mariposa ! The cabin was stunning and had a warm comfy feeling we felt right at home. The hot tub was a great extra activity and we enjoyed the disco ball it was keas favorite haha ! We even got some turkey guests ! It was genuinely perfect and we couldn’t have asked for a better place to stay thank you so much for letting us stay ! Would come again and again ! Ps. The biggest comfiest bed I’ve been in lol :)
Beautiful and cozy escape🙌🏽 Would definitely come again!

My partner and I had an amazing stay. It was super peaceful and the place had everything you need. We definitely have to come back when it’s not raining so that we can utilize the hot tub and beautiful outdoor kitchen. They also provided a guide book with recommendations for places to eat, hikes/trails in Yosemite, and things to do. I enjoyed looking through it and using some of their suggestions, it was very helpful. Thank you again, Avand and Connie. Our dog, Mila, had so much fun roaming around the area as well hehe.
Have a great stay here, definitely would visit again.

Loved it!! Would go again and again
Wish we could live there✨
Loved staying here during our quick trip to Yosemite! The cabin was cozy and the hot tub was awesome. Would definitely recommend!

We had an amazing stay at this property while visiting Yosemite! The location was perfect, and the hot tub was an incredible bonus. The backyard was a standout feature, with a grill and a fun disco setup that made for super chill evenings.
The house had everything we needed and more—it truly felt like the hosts went above and beyond to provide a cozy and warm welcome. We felt so taken care of and truly welcomed throughout our stay.
Unfortunately, my husband and I couldn't explore much of Yosemite due to the weather, but staying in this cozy home more than made up for it.
We will definitely be back! Thank you for hosting us.

This was an incredible cabin that I hope to return to soon! Felt right at home in this warm cabin in the hills of Mariposa County. Quick hour-long drive to Yosemite was convenient, and downtown Mariposa was charming!

We absolutely loved our stay here. The perfect place for a staycation! The stars were stunning and the hot tub was so nice to relax in. Avand was very responsive when we had trouble with the outdoor cooking area and helped us get that all situated.
We were a bit bummed the dishwasher wasn’t working and the hammock wasn’t set out on the porch like in the pictures. We can’t complain too much though considering how gorgeous this property is!
Overall, this is definitely now a saved airbnb for us and we will be back:)

Enjoyed our stay at Avand's cabin when visiting Yosemite for a few days. The home is cozy and relaxing after long days of hiking. It is about an hour from the park, but the drive is beautiful. Would stay here again!
I have absolutely no complaints about this stay. Everything about it was great!! Especially the bidet 🤣.
Lovely and spacious cottage - a perfect for outdoor adventure getaway.
We absolutely loved our stay in this cabin. We felt right at home and we’re not missing a thing. It was such a wonderful place to come back to after a day in Yosemite.
A welcome basket of Snacks would be nice since it’s so far from town

comments.comments:
Positive:
- Fantastic big place to stay
- Kitchen well equipped
- Amazing outdoor area
- Friend contact
- Mariposa is a nice little place with nice restaurants
Negative:
- 1h drive to the park

reviews.comments: We really enjoyed staying here. It was nice to be away from the hustle and bustle of town. Avands place went above and beyond some other places as far as having items in the kitchen and other misc things that made the trip complete. It's also pretty centrally located between both Yosemite entrances. Thanks again!
Maybe the best AirBnB in which I’ve stayed. Great setting, very clean, quiet, peaceful, all the amenities. Thank you.
Super cozy and convenient. Had everything we needed

A nice comfortable home away from home. Very clean , quiet setting. Every was taken care of very welll. Short drive to Yosemite, a great place to come back to relax.  Any questions we had were replied to quickly. Would highly recommend this place to everyone.

This cabin was beautiful and thoughtfully designed for guests which I appreciated. Avand was also very helpful in my trip planning for Yosemite. I felt comfortable and right at home for my much needed nature getaway! Highly recommend. 🙏🏽🌲✨🦌🌄

Thank you for welcoming us back. We had an amazing time in Yosemite! I really appreciated how quickly Connie responded when I informed her about the empty propane tank—she had it changed within 15 minutes. Avand and Connie are fantastic hosts who genuinely care about their guests' experiences.
we definitely enjoyed ourselves.
We had an amazing stay for 2 nights in this cozy cabin. We had a great barbecue, visited Yosemite and enjoyed the jacuzzi, would definitely recommend!!
Cozy cabin. Not terribly convenient to amenities but beautiful.
Amazing
Cozy, comfortable & peaceful cabin! Perfect location for visiting Yosemite.
The house was very comfy and beautiful
Avand's place was great for us. Clean and the outdoor kitchen area was a great bonus. Quiet area in the country. I'd stay here again!

Avand as a host and the cabin as a destination were faultless. We were made to feel at home even before we arrived. The amenities were better than expected, Avand’s advice and insights in the book were perfect. Just a lovely visit, better than we had hoped.

comments.comments:
An absolutely beautiful cabin in a quiet location with a hot tub and outdoor kitchen.
Can really recommend the place to anyone who wants to stay near Yosemite National Park.
The host is very friendly and helpful, everything worked smoothly.

reviews.comments: Perfect spot to explore Yosemite and the local area! Avand was very responsive, and the cabin is well-maintained with great amenities.

comments.comments: Simply beautiful 100% recommended I would definitely go back to the same place the hosts are very friendly always responded to anything all clean and everything you need to be ai and enjoy without worries very clean jacuzzi and the meat roast would not just describe such a beautiful place 🙏

reviews.comments:
This is a lovely home. Spotless, everything provided and more. About 45 min from Yosemite… we enjoyed the day there then the drive home was not bad at all. Patio is lovely on a warm night, and the disco ball lights are FUN! We look forward to coming back soon! Thank you for a wonderful experience!
Jennifer Nelson
Our stay was very relaxing! It was a perfect getaway!

We realy enjoyed our stay.
The location was so good acsess to Yosemite and perfect for our 2 dogs. The sky was filled with wonderful stars and it was so beautiful. The cabin was very clean and also comfortable. We had stayed only 3days here,but I would recommend renting more long days.
Thank you Avand and Connie!
Had a great stay here. Recommend for those visiting Yosemite and don’t have a problem waking up early to get into the park before the rush

Avand was a wonderful host. Kind and responsive and the cabin was gorgeous. Guest book included everything we needed to know including local recommendations and insight into the different hikes available nearby. We were so happy to stay at Kaleidoscope Hill!!!!
Nice place. Had a good time.
It was great night staying one night
Loved the place, would come back again.
This place was amazing. House was well equipped, bed was super comfortable. Hot tub outside was a plus. Avand was very responsive.
Absolutely great place

As a single mom traveling with kids, I was met with respect and professionalism. Avand was a pleasant and knowledgeable host. I appreciated his attention to detail and precision in hospitality. Kaleidoscope Hill exceeded my expectations by far! We will most likely make it back to Kaleidoscope Hill for a second and longer stay! We had a great time in Yosemite National Park which seemed like a very short, easy drive in!
we loved this place for our first yosemite trip! everything was amazing!

This cabin was exactly as described, a perfect place to unwind after spending the days in Yosemite/Kings Canyon.  Avand and Connie were so helpful: proactively providing tips on the area, places to go, what to expect at Yosemite.  They responded quickly to questions so even though we were in a cabin near the woods, we never really felt we were left to figure things out on our own.  I would definitely recommend both the place and the hosts!
This was one of my absolute favorite spots Ive stayed at. So peaceful and a really gorgeous setting. I would highly recommend this place to others!

We will definitely be coming back in the near future. It was our daughter's first ever vacation and she was able to experience the beauty of Yosemite. Great place, really felt like a home. Our favorite part was grilling under the stars and having our daughter try her first Smore. Thank you again!
Best backyard of any place I’ve stayed and that’s important!

Beautiful cabin which was perfect for our stay in Yosemite. Great location close to Mariposa and Oakhurst and close to Yosemite National Park. Would definitely recommend this place for a stay in Yosemite!
Very quick to respond .. one problem I couldn’t use the barbecue but Avand came and sorted it out .. so felt very heard !!
Amazing stay
It was a great experience staying at Avand’s place, clean and quiet,everything was well organized, we enjoyed so much. Thanks !
Amazing stay! Host was responsive, and left clear instructions. If I come back to the area I’d definitely stay here again!
Great place, would recommend!
About 1 hour 20 minutes drive from the Arch Rock entrance of Yosemite. The place is cozy and lovely. Very excellent bathroom!
The location was easy to find and checkin was seamless.  The place was clean and homely. All the amenities worked as expected.

Avands airbnb was perfect. My wife and I celebrated our anniversary there and spent some time in Yosemite. Restaurants are about 20 minutes away from the property and Yosemite is roughly an hour away. We did use the kitchen a lot, which was perfect and also the barbecue grill and hot tub. I would definitely recommend this airbnb to anyone that is visiting yosemite.

Avand's place feels like a hug in the mountains. This was our last trip to our favorite park - Yosemite, and Avand's home made us feel at home and welcomed over the trip. The property has all the latest amenities, and the hot tub is a luxury (along with the heated bidet seat!).
The kitchen is well stocked up and there are ample utensils and silverware to cook a feast in there. We stayed for more than a week and we cooked homemade meals easily. The W/D combo is a good option over a long stay. There's tons of walking space around the place and we enjoyed taking walks (when it wasn't snowing) with our pet cat. We even spotted a bunch of deers who visited the property often.
But what stood out, was when it snowed (yes in April & more than 10 inches) and we were holed in the home, and Avand came to our rescue with his personal stash of food & plowing the snow from the driveway to make it easy for us to get out. I'd totally come back and stay here any given day again.

We had an amazing time! The host super welcoming, responsive and thoughtful! He left us welcome gift for our birthday. The scenery is breathtaking! It’s a really peaceful place! The location is great to get to the city nearby or up Yosemite valley.

This cabin was a really cool find and area is just absolutely beautiful.
Upon our arrival the boat recommended a nearby spot called Sierra Cider, which was less than a mile down the road. I’m so grateful they told us about it because we really enjoyed checking it out and meeting some of the locals.
The cabin itself was really clean, the host was friendly, the home was even more beautiful in person than the pictures, check-in was easy, and to my surprise the bed was probably the most comfortable bed I had ever slept on - seriously, I slept like a baby there.
I’m definitely planning on coming back sometime soon during the summer.
Grateful to have found this place.
To any future guests, be sure you check out the Sierra Cider place and the neighboring pizza shop located at the same location- you won’t be disappointed.
Cheers,
Melinda
Absolutely LOVELY place to stay while visiting Yosemite. we spent a week here and loved how cozy and stocked the place is. We especially loved the outdoor kitchen area with the disco ball!

This place was perfect. The kitchen had everything you could hope for and more (including ranch dressing for the pizza we bought in town). It’s quiet and peaceful, the hot tub is glorious. Could not ask for anything more

This was the absolute best place we ever could’ve dreamed of for our honeymoon. It was so peaceful and relaxing. We loved the outside area with the grill and hot tub. We definitely needed this little piece of heaven! We loved the personal touch that was provided by Avand! We hope to be back soon!
The cabin is very nice, the bed was a little hard, but still worth it! The hot tub was super nice. Thank you.
Had a very quick but amazing stay at Avand’s cabin! It was so so peaceful. Such a gorgeous and clean home, would definitely recommend to all!
Very cozy place! Shame we couldn't use the tub but it looks really good
Avand's place was clean and comfortable. Really close to Yosemite but it was also nice to have a bit of a getaway from the city.

My boyfriend and I had an absolutely wonderful time during our recent stay at Avand's cabin in . This trip was a much-needed break from the hustle and bustle of Los Angeles, and it exceeded all our expectations. The cabin itself was a true gem nestled in the heart of nature. Surrounded by  trees, it provided the perfect escape from the daily grind. The moment we stepped inside, we felt the warmth and coziness of the place. The rustic charm of the cabin was complemented by modern amenities, and everything was clean and well-maintained. One of the highlights of our stay was the hot tub. After a long day of hiking in Yosemite, there was nothing better than sinking into the bubbling hot water while gazing up at the night sky. It was the ideal way to relax and unwind, and it left us feeling rejuvenated and ready for the next day's adventures.  Thank you again!
We had an amazing time. Avand was fantastic with some issues we had with our dates and was great about helping us out. Would love to stay again and highly recommend!
It was an amazing lodge with excellent facilities, very clean and a great outside area including bbq and an amazing hot tub to use, star gazing

Loved our stay here! Avand is a great host and has a really cool place. Our favorite part was watching the stars while relaxing in the hot tub with the disco ball on in the backyard. There was so much to love here - the bed was super comfortable, the kitchen has everything you need and we enjoyed the bottle of local hard cider that was waiting for us. Would love to stay here again next time we visit Yosemite.

Absolutely loved this place! Avand and Connie did an awesome job in decorating for my wife’s birthday she really loved it! Fantastic views, cozy home nice bbq and hot tub. We wish we rented an additional night! I would definitely recommend this place!
Amazing, peaceful venue. Clean, well appointed.
It was perfect !! Very clean and beautiful
Avand cabin was quiet and peaceful and provided  everything that we needed.

We had a wonderful weekend. After hiking all day, the hot tub was exactly what we needed.
Avand has a great personality and communicates very well.

The place was perfect. It was just as the pictures show. It was very quite, private and clean.
Avand was always responsive and checked in to make sure we were all good.
We'd 100% stay here again!
Great place to stay, perfect place for two when going to Yosemite.
Very comforting and clean place to stay. Overall, will recommend others to stay in this beautiful Cabin.
Such a thought out cozy cabin in the woods. The porch for sunsets and coffee in the morning with an added hot tub under the stars. Felt like home

My husband and Ioved this place — full of thoughtful touches and beautifully decorated. I started my day drinking coffee on the porch, which was very peaceful. Coffeemaker is fancy and lovely by the way, and provided coffee beans and grinder. Hot tub was nice after a day of hiking.
It was about 1h15 to Yosemite and about 15 minutes from downtown Mariposa where there are some restaurants and a grocery store. We’d recommend this Airbnb!

My husband and I stayed here for a week for our trip to Yosemite.
The kitchen was fully stocked, the washer and dryer were great for sweaty clothes, & the shower water pressure & temp worked fine.

Our favorite thing(s) were the outdoor amenities. We soaked in the hot tub & used the bar & grill nearly every night. It was awesome to relax like this after hiking in the park.
Some things to know:
There is another cabin about 30-50 feet away. I wasn’t aware it was so close. This cabin’s main window faces the bedroom & bathroom window. There is a window covering/tint on the bathroom window but it’s still see through. It was also a little awkward being in the hot tub on some nights because we could see the other tenants & they could see us. Pics 22 & 23 show the distance, I overlooked this.
The bedroom gets a little stuffy but it isn’t terrible if you leave the door open. A box fan would helpful drawing in the cool air from the living room where the air conditioner is located.

Fantastic stay. The place was amazing to access Yosemite and was actually so nice we wanted to stay at the house more than we wanted to go to Yosemite at one point. Well stocked with the necessities and even some extras. 12/10 place. would definitely stay again and recommend to others doing a Yosemite trip. Thank you!
We spent much needed family time here. It had everything we needed and more. It was super comfortable and very relaxing. Beautiful home :)

comments.comments: A very nice place about 1.5 hours from Yosemite Valley. We were able to end the evenings after the hikes in the national park in great weather with barbecue and views from the hot tub into the stars. We were super satisfied.

reviews.comments: Great place to stay while visiting g Yosemite. Hot tub was just what we needed after a full day of hiking.

This airbnb was the perfect spot for 2 couples visiting Yosemite! We were within an hour / hour and a half from the park, and spent a lot of time utilizing the outdoor kitchen and hot tub when we came home to relax. Avand & Connie were very responsive and friendly hosts. We would absolutely stay again!
Wonderful friendly host. Extremely pleased with Avand’s beautiful cabin. Would stay again without hesitation
Loved this very fun and comfortable cottage!!  It was more than we expected and wished we could have stayed longer to enjoy!!

This was the best cabin we stayed in for our entire trip! Avand was also a wonderful host who replied quickly and gave us all the info we needed before we even knew it. From the well stocked kitchen to the hot tub and outdoor grill, it was everything we wanted from a stay to get to Yosemite.
Avand’s place was the perfect place to stay at during our trip to Yosemite, we’d love to stay here again!

Great private cabin with awesome hot tub to soak in after long hikes in Yosemite. Kitchen was well stocked, great laundry facility and showers had shampoo conditioner and body wash. Avand and Connie were fantastic to communicate with, very accommodating and super fast to respond. Location is a good base for Yosemite.
Very comfortable home in peaceful setting off main rural road with so many birds singing all day long. Very comfortable furnishings inside and out.
Beautiful place close to Yosemite.
I cannot say enough amazing things about this stay. It was beautiful inside and out. It was nicer then the pictures and the pictures are beautiful.
It was a beautiful house. Location was hard to find in the dark, so definitely come in the daytime. He prepared us for this though, so we knew what to look for. Everything was nice and clean.
Stunning in every way!
We had a wonderful time at Avand's cabin. The cabin was very cosy, clean, had all the amenities and was conveniently located and in a quiet area. We highly recommend it and hope to return again soon.

Beautiful stay in Mariposa while we visited Yosemite. Despite being an hour outside the park, the drive in the morning was well worth it. We loved using the hot tub after a day in the park. Avand’s clever rhymes around the house made us laugh as well.

This place was amazing! Much needed relaxing and comfortable cabin after a few days hiking and exploring Yosemite. It was also a nice transition from camping, while still being secluded in a private, beautiful cabin. This place was incredible and we thoroughly enjoyed our stay! The host was super helpful and included everything and more needed for the stay.
We had a great experience! The cabin is the perfect getaway, I am looking forward to comeback.
It was cleaner than I thought and it was nice to have many things prepared.

we were lucky enough to have met Avand and Connie both were very friendly. The  airbnb was more then I expected it was so warm and inviting when we walked in felt like home away from home. I will recommend this cabin to everyone. Glad I picked this cabin for our honeymoon.
It was a beautiful and comfortable cabin in the woods and made our trip to Yosemite magical. Would love to stay here again in the future.
What a perfect and cozy place to stay, easy access to Yosemite but lovely to be in regardless. Would definitely recommend and come back!
Amazing cabin with everything you need for an amazing stay in Mariposa. Hosts are responsive & very helpful.

I am a local to Mariposa. I live out of state now, and had to go back to do some work stuff. This place was amazing. Avand was very helpful and helpful. I had a problem with the bathroom lights, and it was fixed the next morning. Very appreciative. The bed was comfortable, hot tub was absolutely amazing!
Beautiful place. If you’re looking for a wonderful peaceful getaway spot definitely come here. Only an hour away from Yosemite, and 20 minutes away from a grocery store. Loved every moment.
Great little cabin and host. Thanks

Such a sweet cabin, well appointed with lots of nice touches~ well equipped kitchen, very comfortable bed, glorious hot tub. Something to note for those who run cold: bring slippers if it’s winter!! The only heat source comes from the living room ceiling so the bedroom and bathroom can be quite chilly, esp the floors 🥶. All in all though, a fantastic place. Would like to come back in summer to utilize the outdoor patio/bbq, etc!
Great place

If you’re looking for a place near Yosemite, this is one to consider. Beautifully decorated with amenities like a hot tub, and an additional outdoor kitchen which I could imagine is nice to enjoy during the summer. The hosts were also proactive and communicative, and I appreciated their Welcome Guidebook which was in the living room
Absolutely loved this place! The house was beautiful and super peaceful! The jacuzzi was perfect and it snowed while we were there! I would definitely come back to this place.

Awesome stay just outside of Yosemite, peaceful property and surrounding area. The comfort and warmth of the house was just what we were looking for. Will definitely be coming back for a longer stay next time.
Good place to stay and do jacuzzi stargazing !

Thank you so much for sharing your beautiful cabin with us! It was really amazing and even more than what you could imagine. Our hosts were so responsive and great at communicating throughout the stay. Easy 1000/10 ☺️

My partner and I enjoyed a lovely few days deliberately and literally doing *nothing.* We just wanted to zone out and hang out somewhere that wasn't home. And hell, this place was perfect for that. Fully stocked, comfortable AF, we slept, ate, did some crafts (okay, so that's not "nothing" per se) and slept, slept, slept. It was perfect. Plus, we basically became one with the hot tub. Thanks for a great spot!
Had a very peaceful time ☺️ cabin was super cute and all the little notes around gave us a good laugh 🙂 thank you for welcoming to your home will definitely be booking again some time soon !

We had the most amazing weekend at Kaleidoscope Hill! Extra points for it being so beautiful in the snow. Everything was perfect, and the hot tub was our favorite touch. It’s so peaceful in the backyard. The hosts are super responsive, and accommodating with power outages in a winter storm - they are ultra prepared! Book this place… you will not regret it!!!
Nice home we’ll furnished. Bring some food and get comfy.
the toilet has a bidet. that alone sets it higher than any other Airbnb I've stayed at in the US. it's well equipped with cute rhyming notes throughout the house. I would love to stay here again
Anand’s place was great. Awesome location and great amenities! The hosts were very accommodating.

The cabin is absolutely amazing the host was easy to contact and has worked with me above and beyond for extra day accommodations I had zero complaints and would absolutely stay here again if you’re looking for a quiet remote getaway that is close enough to town to pop over and grab some thing you forgot from the store this is your place five star rating across-the-board
That was great time to stay here

This was one of the most pleasant Airbnb experiences I have ever had. The home is set up so well, it really felt like a home meant to live in. The patio is perfect for spending evenings outdoors and the location isn’t bad (about 1 hour to the southwestern park entrance and 1 hr 10 min to most trailheads in the valley. I highly recommend!

This place was perfect. After a long day at Yosemite it was really nice to come back, cook a nice meal, and relax in the hot tub. Appliances are top notch and even had detergent provided! It had basically anything you could need including an assortment of spices and minced garlic! Slept great in the bed- a little on the firmer side, but my husband slept like a log!

We had such a great time in Mariposa and Yosemite - the cabin was the perfect place for us to relax. We slept better than we had in weeks and I’d love to know what kind of magical mattress we slept on.
Avand has thought of everything to make the cabin comfortable, and everything in the home is so beautiful. We loved being there at the end of summer and see glimpses of fall in the surrounding trees. We would return in a heartbeat.

This place was perfect for our honeymoon! The size of the house, the outdoor space, and the quiet town was perfect for our stay. Avand responded quickly to all messages and even provided yoga mats after I asked if any were at the house. I absolutely recommend this house for your stay!
Great spot and host . Super clean and organized . Nice outdoor kitchen and hot tub . Bring steaks !

This is such a gorgeous cabin with brilliant facilities and such nice hosts. The location is quiet and tranquil, and the features are magical. I would highly recommend this to anyone looking to explore nearby Yosemite!
Beautiful stay!!!
Great place to stay! The scenery was wonderful and the hosts are great with communication.
Excellent lodge! Everything you would need is there. The outside kitchen and jacuzzi are perfect! We will recommend it to our friends
perfect stay!

I would definitely highly recommend this mariposa house and the wilderness around is beautiful as well as the wildlife and charming and I also forgot to mention that the mariposa house is close to Yosemite national park. And if you are planning to go to Yosemite national park this house highly recommended.

Kaleidoscope Hill is a perfect spot. Avand has really considered every aspect of a perfect AirBnb stay; the location is private yet close to everything, the space is well decorated and well kept, the kitchen is stocked without having to bring anything, the bed is super comfy… I could go on and on. We had a lovely stay at Avand’s. We will definitely be back. Thank you, Avand!
The Cabin is well appointed and in a great location.

Overall the stay was good, location was shotty with no cellular connection once you get into the mountains. Check in time and check out time were a bit poor with the amount of money spent for one night, listing didn’t mention anything about water being drinkable or not, tap water was well water and tasted of iron and was not good, having full use of all utilities was nice though and backyard was nice, AC worked OK, unit was not working properly and temps rose to 85 when cooking. We weren’t Able to adjust the temp. Fully stocked kitchen and utensils to use was a bonus, private parking was nice. Overall 8/10 stay.
Beautiful location( so close to the Yosemite) gorgeous cabin and the best host. We had a great time and will return :)

comments.comments: This is a very sophisticated, beautiful homestay with high-end amenities, thoughtful consideration, the outdoor grill area with hot tub was very good, really recommend it.

reviews.comments: Such a wonderful location and the perfect base camp for our Yosemite trip! The jacuzzi was the perfect way to end the day after a long hike.

Overall highly recommended. Beautiful house and super well maintained. It can sleep 4. The sofa bed is on the firm side, so a more sensitive sleeper may not have the best time.  Drive into the town is ~17 minutes and has everything you need to stock up for Yosemite. I will be coming back.
Y’all!! This place is perfection!!! Highly recommend!! They have everything and super comfy ❤️❤️

One of the best stays we have had. Extremely well stocked for cooking/grilling which pairs well with the incredible outdoor space! The hot tub was perfect for using after a long hike. Would definitely go back if we are in the area
Great place, amenities and hospitality.

This cabin was absolutely wonderful. Perfect for our couple days in Yosemite. The outdoor kitchen was great for cooking dinner, and the hot tub was wonderful for our sore muscles from hiking! We highly recommend, and would stay here again in a heartbeat!

The place was spectacular! It was very clean and well equipped. The bed was very comfortable and plenty of towels to go around. The backyard bbq area and hot tub was amazing after a long day of hiking. Avand is a super cool dude and very easy to talk to! Highly recommend!

We had a lovely stay! The house is a perfect home base for exploring Yosemite and it is so nice to come back from a long day at the park to wonderful outdoor spaces, a fully stocked kitchen, and a really great hot tub! We loved the porch and outdoor bar and all the amenities. Communication was great and responses were quick and they provided everything you needed to know. I would definitely stay here again! Don’t hesitate to book!

Avand’s place is the best of both worlds - close to Yosemite while still having the privacy of your own space. The hot tub is wonderful post hike and the outdoor grilling space made for fun dinners. Avand’s place provides anything and everything you could ever need to cook. The communication was excellent, we couldn’t have asked for anything better. Highly recommend!

What a gem of a place! Saw a deer crossing the yard in the morning. Close to Yosemite (easy drive). The hot tub is amazing especially after hiking. Great to wash clothes before returning home. Book with confidence! Wonderful place!

A perfect retreat! a little oasis tucked away in a beautiful tranquil corner of the world. Hosts have thought about absolutely everything and it's location lends itself perfectly to adventures in Yosemite.

comments.comments: Superb cottage, American-style luxury! Very good location to visit Yosémite and perfectly equipped. No complaints! Don't hesitate:-)

reviews.comments: Great cabin to stay at for a trip to Yosemite. Clean, comfortable, and has all the comforts you need for a relaxing trip away from home!

I can't say enough good things about this cabin. Very clean, very well thought of in terms of amenities and supplies provided. The location is wonderful, not too far from supermarkets. It is a bit far from the park, but I don't think you can get much closer to it unless you stay inside the park.
The cabin itself is very cute, adorably decorated, even the pull out couch was very comfortable!
We would highly recommend and will most likely be back in the future.
Avands place is beautiful, well organized, and a great location for accessing Yosemite.
Avand’s place was perfect for a girls weekend getaway. We loved it.

If you’re looking for a great stay outside Yosemite NP then look no further. We appreciated the proximity to the park while still having our own space. Strong pros - stocked kitchen, cozy atmosphere, hottub, stargazing, and bidet (lol). Perfect for couples for any occasion. Would definitely stay again. Note - you will be an hour drive away from the park and about 20 minutes to the nearest town or grocery store. Would recommend stocking up beforehand.
Great place to stay with amazing amenities. It was very comfortable and we appreciated the little details
This stay was exactly as described… The location was great and the hosts were very communicative and accommodating!

An excellent experience! Avand, Danee and Connie were all amazing and quick to respond to my messages. The cabin is adorable; all the little touches, from the mulled cider to the decor, show all the love and care that has gone into this Airbnb. I would highly recommend it to anyone looking for a getaway! Hope to return soon!

5 stars is not enough to describe this unique & amazing stay. Avand & their team exceeded my expectations as this cabin was more stocked, more clean, more welcoming than any 5 star hotel I have ever stayed in. From a well stocked kitchen, comfortable & clean bedding, huge & welcoming living room, clean & hitech bathroom and a beautiful backyard with a functional jacuzzi & bar/ grill for hosting. This stay will forever be my go to when im back in the area. Avand & the team communication is spectacular, needless to say it truly felt like home. Thank you!
This was one of the best air bnb we have stayed in ! Extremely clean and beautiful cabin ! Extremely well stocked and close to Yosemite… DEFINITELY RECOMMEND

If you’re looking to get away to a place of calmness & tranquility, then this is it. Such a cozy place to be! Communication is so quick with Avand and the place has everything you need, with their sweet extra touches!
A beautiful cabin and very cozy. the host was very communicative and would definitely come back!

We have recommended this place to everyone. Pictures don't do it justice. Beautiful touches throughout, as well as witty notes that are helpful as well as funny.
Interior feels professionally decorated.
Some items in posted pics have been replaced and updated, like the big screen Roku in the bedroom, dishwasher, and workstation with monitor. There are also more boardgames than you see in the pic.
No musty smells here as there is an air purifier as well.
Grill preheats to 500F in a matter of minutes (even on a cold windy January night).
Hosts even had a lovely card and bottle of cider waiting for us.
Loved our stay. It was very easy and comfortable. Hot tub was so wonderful. Really nice spot and so well stocked. Very organized process. Would definitely stay again!
Awesome spot! Was very well stocked and looked just like the pictures! Would come back
This is one of the best places I’ve stayed in a while through this app. Very quick to respond to messages and these hosts clearly care about making the stay special for their guests. 10/10 amazing

The place was perfect for our family of 3. While our stay, even though we were stuck indoors due to heavy unexpected snowfall and snow, the place was well equipped to spend the time. The hosts are very good in staying in touch and made sure we were out safely by clearing up the long driveway full of snow.

Avand and Connie were great hosts. They made sure I knew exactly what was going on and they made sure that my stay at the cabin went smoothly. The cabin itself was amazing! The hot tub, the kitchen, the grill, and the beds were great! Everything was as described.
Such a great place! The cabin is cozy, clean, and well-stocked. The hosts were so helpful and responsive. This was the perfect place to stay while visiting Yosemite!

this is definitely one of the best airbnbs i’ve ever stayed at! it’s really nice and the cabin is exactly what it is in the pictures. it was truly nice and everything was so pretty. it gave us a lot of house inspo! if you’re staying in winter, it gets very cold but it’s worth it! driving at night is scary though so get there before sundown!
Great place to stay, very private. The house was beautiful and we had a great time. I would definitely go back/recommend this place.

We had an amazing time. The home is cozy and there are many creature comfort amenities. The hot tub was wonderful.
Thank you!!!
The best cabin! So fully stocked and welcoming. We wish we booked it longer.

Perfect cozy cabin for two people! The cabin is well stocked and looks even better than in the pictures. It is about 45 minutes away from the park entrance and 20 minutes from downtown Mariposa. We wished we had an extra day to just enjoy the cabin, especially the outdoor area/hot tub! Avand was a wonderful host and was friendly and responsive throughout our stay.

You won't find a better host or Airbnb, especially within reach of Yosemite. This was our second time staying here and we plan to continue booking annually. The kitchen and grill is a real treat for those who love to cook, the porch is a prime place to linger, the disco ball sends reliably good vibes in all directions, and the hot tub and comfy bed will restore your legs after a long day in the park. It's a perfect place.
A great place to relax and unwind after hiking in Yosemite!
Great place!

Avand’s place was great. The cabin gave me and my partner a ton of ideas of a place we’d want in the future.
Avand’s about the little details. Hilarious little jokes on the labels around the house. It’s the humor that was the cherry on top of our trip.

This is by far the most well stocked Airbnb I have ever stayed in. They have everything and anything you could possibly need to cook with. They even had different types of tea! The decorations are so cute and the king size bed is comfortable. It is about 1 hour 15 minutes to Yosemite Valley, 45 minutes to the entrance of the park. It was about 15 minutes from the restaurants/stores in mariposa. The hosts were good at communicating and very friendly.

Had such an amazing time! The cabin feels tucked away in the woods but is still actually close to town. It’s decorated beautifully and feels very cozy. The kitchen was STOCKED - great to cook in. The hot tub was wonderful after hiking in Yosemite. My husband and I slept like babies there. AND, Avand and Danee are great hosts. They are there for whatever you need. They are also super nice, social people so if you like to get to know your hosts, you have that option. But if you want to keep to yourself, they will totally leave you be as well. Looking forward to our next stay at kaleidoscope hill!
Host was very communicative throughout our stay, we enjoyed the hot tub and the grill patio area, would recommend this place to anybody who is visiting Yosemite.
this place is outstanding, what a marvelous mountain retreat and easy entry point to Yosemite. one of our all time favorite Airbnb stays!

This stay is amazing!! Somehow, it looks even better in person. The hosts were so accommodating and even had a surprise for our elopement. About an hour drive to Yosemite. The grill outside and hot tub is a bonus. Everything was clean. Comfy bed, all you need to cook, and washer/dryer. They thought of everything. We can’t wait to go back for an anniversary trip.

The cabin was absolutely wonderful. We did not want to go home. Everything you need for your stay has been thought of. The kitchen is well stocked including both utensils and spices. The bed is very comfortable. We used the hot tub daily to ease our sore muscles from hiking. Highly recommend.

This place was amazing and so well equipped. We could not have asked for a better place to stay for our Yosemite trip. Coming home every night to rest our sore muscles in the hot tub was the best. This neighborhood was sooo quiet and you could see a billion stars. The bed and pillows were comfy and we slept well everynight. The kitchen was well stocked with everything you could need for cooking and we had all of our meals in the house! If we are in the area again I would definitely stay here again!

Wonderful retreat after hiking in Yosemite! About an hour from the El Portal entrance and the views are great along the way. Avand and Danee made so many personal touches throughout the house and during our stay. Connie made the place spotless prior to our arrival. The view of the stars from the hot tub was great in the evening. We would definitely stay again, and will refer friends traveling that way!
Great experience and stay. Loved their outdoor kitchen!
Great host, amazing cabin and amenities! Absolutely loved our stay here

I was here for a much needed isolated getaway for a couple of days and a trip to Yosemite National Park and Avand and company completely respected my wishes in regards to that. The place was great and had everything I needed for my stay. Its in a great location and has amazing views on the drive there and back and also to Yosemite. Would definitely recommend!
This place is worth every penny. You won’t be disappointed. The stars from the hot tub were amazing!

This cabin was the perfect spot to come back to after spending our days exploring Yosemite. We especially enjoyed grilling out back, laying in the hammock, and sitting in the hot tub at night watching the stars. Avand was a great host and had helpful suggestions for during and after our stay in Mariposa. I would recommend staying here to anyone!
Cozy place and in a good location between Yosemite Valley and Downtown Mariposa

Avand’s place was amazing! It’s a great place to stay if you are going to Yosemite! We prepped breakfast, left for a day hike, prepped dinner in the outdoor kitchen, then relaxed in the hot tub. It’s the perfect distance from Yosemite and we were able to entire via the fish camp entrance and el portal. Facilities were phenomenal and the Avand was extremely nice and accessible.

Beautiful and cleanhome.  all kinds of thoughtful touches.  perfect if you love to cook!  sharp knives, quality cookware and plenty of lovely and useful serving dishes. Beautiful location and less than an hour from Yosemite. We recommend and would rent again!

My husband and I really loved our stay at Kaleidoscope Hill.  It was a fantastic resting place after days at Yosemite.  The house was well stocked with everything you need to cook, rest, and enjoy the area.

Avand’s place is fantastic, an hour’s drive from Yosemite and close to Mariposa and the shops and restaurants. The Airbnb is really nice, and has everything one can need and want. Really clean, well stocked and absolutely comfortable! The decor is cozy and inviting and the barbecue was great to use! Can’t recommend this place enough for a relaxing get-a-way!!

Avand was a great host for his very cute and and well apportioned mountain cabin.
My wife and I really enjoyed our stay and look forward to a future opportunity to return..
This is a beautiful home and a relaxing get away! We couldn’t have had a better time. The location and amenities make this the place to stay if you’re doing Yosemite or mariposa.

One of the best airbnbs I've stayed in. I could have lived there for a month and been comfortable. All of the appliances are high end performance. The space was both airy and cozy. The bed was phenomenal. We stayed at a few airbnbs and hotels on our trip out west and this one ruined all the others for us after because it became the gold standard.

This cabin is awesome! Very cozy, private space, with amenities to boot! It's within good driving range of Yosemite which was why we visited. Mariposa is about 20 minutes away (I drive slow) providing restaurants, grocery, and gas. We saw a bunch of wildlife like deer, horse, coyote, snake, and others while on the road. The bed is incredibly comfortable, the kitchen excellent, and outdoor space has bonuses like a hot tub and outdoor kitchen. I can't recommend this cabin enough! We went here for our honeymoon and it exceeded expectations.

This was the perfect place for our family to stay while we visited Yosemite. We got to the gate in about an hour, which really wasn’t bad.
The pull out worked perfectly for our 5 and 6 year old and the bed was very comfortable! My kids also loved the disco ball outside, and the property was really fun for them to explore.
There is so much attention to detail, and the hosts are amazingly responsive. We didn’t use the hot tub since it was 100°+ throughout our entire stay, but it was so nice to have the option. We’d definitely stay here again!

The PERFECT place to stay for visiting Yosemite! It was an easy drive to Yosemite Valley and Mariposa Grove a little over an hour drive to each depending on traffic. Other spots in the park will be a longer drive but it’s about as close as you can get without actually staying in the park. This cabin has all the amenities you could need, (full kitchen accessories, plug in stereo system to play music from your phone, games and movies, baking supplies, towels, shampoo, conditioner, body wash, extra blankets pillows, a bidet etc… I could go on and on!) We were able to buy groceries in town (20-25 min drive), and cook every night there. The outside grill and seating are also a bonus and the lights and disco ball make it even more fun. The best part however is the hot tub, it’s great for soaking your sore muscles after hiking (you just have to shower first), and enjoying the starry sky. Everything in the house was easy to find/use and labeled with fun directions. The hosts were very communicative sending messages with all the information you’d need days before and the day of to make sure everything went smoothly or if we needed anything else. They even warned us ahead of time about needing a day pass for Yosemite during the time we’d be visiting which was very helpful. This was our honeymoon trip and we could not have asked for an easier, more peaceful, relaxing stay than what we got here at Kaleidoscope Hill!  Thank you hosts for all your attention to detail and creating such a wonderful place!

We had a wonderful stay at Avand and Danee’s cozy cabin! The cabin was very clean and had all of the amenities we needed. The hot tub was perfect at nighttime after hikes in Yosemite and the grilling area was great! We highly recommend this for your stay if visiting Yosemite NP, it is about an hour from the park and the perfect place to have a quiet relaxing stay after long days of exploring!

Kaleidoscope Hill is gem! The cabin is  super clean, well appointed, and well organized. We cooked all of our meals in Avand’s cabin and especially loved using the outside kitchen. The hot tub was a welcome reward after a day of long hikes in Yosemite. The drive back and forth to Yosemite was completely manageable and very scenic. Once back at the cabin, the quiet surroundings and starry night sky felt so peaceful after the hectic congestion of the park. Avand was immediately responsive and even reached out to us with a Yosemite update on required advanced reservations- which saved our trip!
AMAZING! we loved staying here, wish we could have stayed even longer!
Beautiful location, had an amazing time, me and my wife had a great time enjoyed some hikes nearby and the brewery near by, was just a perfect little vacation.

Avand and Danee’s place is incredible. The photos don’t do it justice. The cabin is gorgeous, comfortable, and well maintained. It’s out of the way and peaceful.  The kitchen is well stocked with the basics for longer stays. It’s a perfect place for a couple or small family to stage their Yosemite vacation.

It’s a really nice place, very nice appliances and very clean. We loved the hot tub and patio. One thing that was a little weird is that the hosts live on the property, it did sometimes feel like we were being watched (the host home is about 10 feet from the airbnb), so maybe just something to consider. Also make sure you are checked out on time, they come over at 10.
Such an amazing spot to get away and have a mini retreat especially with the hot tub and complimentary cider was so nice! Thank you Avand!
Great place, perfect for a Yosemite hiking trip!
Great place to stay outside of Yosemite Valley. The hot tub and outdoor grill were the perfect set up.

My husband and I couldn’t recommend this beautiful home, property, and location more. At first we worried about the commute to and from the park each day, but this was just the reprieve we needed from our long days of hiking. The well equipped and extremely comfortable cabin gave us the ability to refresh and relax. The hot tub, grill/bar, kitchen, comfortable bed, heated bidet!! and cute instructions all over the home were all wonderful. We were thankful to get away from the chaos of the park for some quiet time in the woods. Quick drive to towns in either direction for groceries and dinner out. Wouldn’t want to stay anywhere else when we come back next time.

Great spot about 20 minutes from downtown Mariposa. After a day hiking around Yosemite, the hot tub is a godsend. Lots of thoughtful touches throughout the place make it a joy to hang out in, and the peaceful environs are nice enough to want to just stay on the porch and watch humming birds zip around the yard. Absolutely loved staying here, wish we had extended our stay longer!
Such a great space!
This place is great!  Well maintained, charming, tons of goodies, well described, hot tub is wonderful.  Yes, we had a great time!

100% recommend staying here! It was the perfect cabin to getaway from LA for a few days. We went to Yosemite 2/3 days and it was an easy and enjoyable drive. The cabin is picturesque and so cozy! It had everything we were looking for. One thing not mentioned in the listing is the AMAZING sunset views from the property. We got to enjoy the sky and mountains glowing at sunset every night and it was the cherry on top to the great stay.
The hosts were also so sweet and welcoming and were quick to answer any of our special requests. We’ll be back soon!!
We had an amazing time. Everything was great. The place is so magical and cozy.  We would definitely stay there again.

Very clean and great hospitality.
All the amenities were kindly instructed.
I would love to revisit next year to spend my vacation.

This cabin is so homey and will definitely make your trip so much more worthwhile!  It’s an amazing place with so many wonderful amenities, I couldn’t be happier with my stay here. It was so clean, cozy, and personable. 10/10 would recommend, you won’t regret it at all!!
Def recommend. Great cute spot.

The perfect mountain cabin getaway. Only an hour away from Yosemite park, the cabin was more than what was described and expected. We were there for Thanksgiving and with a well stocked kitchen, were able to prepare a feast. After a long day of hiking, I can't recommend the hot tub under the stars more. Avand and Danee were incredible hosts. There's no doubt in our minds that we'll be back!

Loved my stay here. Can’t wait to come back. Loved the isolation, quiet and nature surrounding the cabin. Hikes in Yosemite during the day and a hot tub at night a perfect combination. Cabin itself is very cozy and well stocked.

We absolutely loved staying at Avand's cabin and thought it was the best Airbnb we've ever stayed at. The cabin itself was cozy and charming, but what exceeded our expectations were all the small touches throughout the cabin--from the rhyming labels/instructions to the fully stocked kitchen. The bed was so comfortable, the place was quiet, and the hot tub was amazing after a long day at Yosemite. Everything was perfect. We can't wait to go back!

Avand’s cabin is amazing! So perfect for my girlfriend and I for a long weekend. The backyard was awesome for hanging out and the hot tub was super relaxing. Everything was incredibly clean and Avand was so nice and helpful. Last, but not least, the bidet was life-changing - ordering one for myself as we speak. Coziest spot, hope to make it back here again!!

Avand and Danee’s spot was incredible. So many thoughtful touches in and around the space. A 45 or so minute drive to the heart of the valley, and only 15 to 20 minutes from a lot of delicious restaurants. I will admit that the space is so cozy with all it’s charm that if you plan to come to explore, be careful as you may end up just wanting to chill in the cabin the entire stay.
Great place with great price, and really nice hosts. Love the place a lot. Will def come back next time.
The cabin was great and we especially loved the hot tub and disco ball! Great place to stay if you’re visiting Yosemite.

This cabin is a total gem. It was extremely easy to communicate with the hosts, they were responsive and very accommodating. The house is beautiful & the backyard with hot tub, disco ball & grill was wonderful after a day at Yosemite. We were there for a birthday and the hosts went above and beyond to draw some birthday chalk art in the driveway. We would definitely come back!
Wonderful place! They have thought of everything. The hot tub was especially nice after long hikes in Yosemite!

This place was wonderful! The cabin was spacious, clean and it had everything that you needed to enjoy your stay. The kitchen was fully stalked with everything you need to cook amazing meals and the backyard/spa area was beautiful and very relaxing. I highly recommend this place and we would definitely stay here again!!

My partner and I stayed here for two nights while we were out enjoying Mariposa County and Yosemite. The cabin was lovely, quiet, and comfortable! As soon as we walked in we knew that this was the perfect place to stay. The large living room was a great place to play games or do some reading, and the kitchen was perfectly situated for entertaining and cooking. A huge bonus was being able to slip into the hot tub after a long day of hiking! Don’t miss out on this gem!

Danee and Avand’s place is absolutely beautiful - it really felt like a home. Everything was well-organized and labeled, and the hosts were available and responsive for any questions. Will definitely look to stay here again next time I’m in the area

We really enjoyed spending our 10-year anniversary at this cabin. Beautiful cabin and area. Such a peaceful place and only an hour drive to Yosemite. The cabin was clean and had everything we needed for a great stay. We really loved the hot tub!
The cabin was amazing, they thought about every little detail to make it special. The host were always there when we need it, we had a relaxing and beautiful stay.

This was the oasis I've been searching for all year. Avand + Danee's place is tucked away in the foothills outside of Yosemite and was relaxing, spacious and intentionally setup. Their welcome binder had all of the information and pro-tips I could ask for about outdoor activities and the home. The outdoor kitchen/bar/seating area was perfect to hang in the afternoon (and read in the hammock) -- plus the disco ball kept the vibrations high all weekend. When we needed a heat break, the AC was a life-saver... but boy did that sunshine feel good after being locked up in San Francisco these past 5 months! Thank you both so much for hosting us in your wonderful space to make me feel reunited and grounded in nature, we appreciate everything from the thoughtful touches to your quick and positive responses to our questions. We will be coming back before the end of this year. <3

Wow! What an awesome experience. Avand + Danee have outdone themselves with their Mariposa AirBnB. B/C Covid-19 shelter-in-place, this was one of the first trips that we've taken since March 2020. It's clear that they've spent a lot of time and effort making their home/property welcoming to guests. They both have great energy and when we booked it, we got an awesome message from Danee welcoming us for our 1-night stay. When we got settled into our room in the main cabin, the clever little details caught my attention. They've thought through every convenience with clear labels and nice little added features like the bidet/heated toilet seat, vintage coffee grinder, unique decor - which all made "Kaleidoscope Hill" (their name for the property) feel like a home away from home. After spending a few minutes chatting with Avand + Danee, it sounds like they've been renting their house out for a few months now so they've pretty much nailed down the check-in process (super easy) and the house was easy to find. One of the things I didn't expect was how private the house felt. There aren't any neighbors really on either side of the house which made our stay secluded, peaceful and relaxing. The thing I loved most about our stay was the "flow". They did a good job of making the spaces easy to flow through i.e. inside to outside. There's an awesome outdoor entertaining area with a sweet hammock, BBQ, outdoor fridge etc. which just made the stay all the moor enjoyable. One thing that surprised me was Avand and Danee's musical talents. They may as well be professional DJ's because they've got some sweet tracks they've put together. Something tells me the way to their hearts is good vibes and good music. Awesome AirBnB stay. Highly recommend. Will definitely book again.

Awesome place. Very nice host who responded promptly and was very courteous. We super appreciated how nice everything was. It looks like the whole cabin was recently renovated and it’s absolutely sparkling. Definitely stay here.

Great location with excellent backyard built-in BBQ and dining area plus spa. Owners are very nice and live onsite in a nearby (but separate) building, so were available for any questions/concerns throughout the stay.
If you want an amazing, relaxing, and fun (esp. cooking, nature, hot tub) time away from it all this is where to go.

Avand + Danee were nothing short from spectacular. They were helpful, kind, and managed to find answers to our questions about the area. The cabin is clean, beautiful, warm, and cozy; it also has an exquisite outdoor area for fun with family and/or friends. I definitely recommend checking out this sweet abode for some blissful mountain time!

This cabin was perfect for a long weekend getaway. It is close enough to go into Yosemite for the day and has great amenities including hot tub, outdoor kitchen and king bed. Thanks again, Avand and Danee, for a great stay!

Avand and Danee did an excellent job setting up this quiet cabin retreat near Yosemite. The house has everything needed for an extended stay, complete with full kitchen and laundry room all on one floor. And they added so many thoughtful touches around the house; we noticed something new nearly every day!! Don't miss using the bar and outdoor kitchen. The hot tub was kept spotlessly clean. Would definitely recommend to anyone traveling to the Yosemite area. Being some distance from Yosemite park is no problem; the drive in makes a scenic adventure each morning.

Avand's home was the perfect mountain escape for my husband and me! The neighborhood is quiet and private, close to the charming historic Mariposa but also ideal for exploring and hiking. We arrived after dark so were very grateful for the clear directions and very visible markers that lead us to Avand's place. After a long drive, we recharged under the stars in the jacuzzi before some very restful sleep in the large bed. Apart from the wonderful hospitality, we especially enjoyed meeting Avand and learning about the area. We can't wait to come back and stay longer! Thank you again for making our first trip to Mariposa so special. P.S. I am still obsessing over the half dollars decorating the grout of the outside kitchen area.

Pictures don’t do this place justice at all! It’s a beautiful, spacious cabin with every amenity imaginable. The bed was incredibly comfy, the kitchen was well stocked and the appliances were incredibly modern and easy to use. Danee and Avand  were amazing hosts. They were responsive but also very chill and gave us space. It didn’t take long to get into Yosemite. We’ll be back! Thank you!

Incredible stay and exactly as described. Easy access to Yosemite, wonderful outdoor BBQ area, and loved the hot tub under the stars. Super easy check-in/out and communication with Danee/Avand was a breeze. Highly recommend!
Avand and Danee were excellent hosts. Their cabin was extremely clean and perfect for a group of four. It was the perfect stay for day trips into Yosemite.

We had such a lovely stay at this cabin! It's very well done and (I'm assuming) recently renovated, plus it was sparkling clean. The outdoor kitchen is where we cooked dinner every night (the indoor kitchen is fully stocked with cooking tools and spices), and the hot tub was perfect after our long days of hiking in Yosemite—also, it was quite possibly the nicest hot tub we've ever been in! The bed was surprisingly comfy, too, and we slept like bears. What makes this place truly special, however, are all of the little extras, from the outdoor disco ball to the bidet, to all of the plants and the hammock, plus we loved all of the helpful yet quirky labels on everything. We had everything we needed to be comfortable, and we felt like we were in a home, not an AirBnB, which is a good thing!
The place was easy to find, thanks to Avand's very clear directions, and the wi-fi was super strong for our entire stay. Yosemite is an hour-long drive (to either the western or southern entrance), but this was the perfect place to come home to every night.

Avand's place is perfectly outfitted and has so many thoughtful touches throughout -- it's one of the nicest Airbnb's I've ever stayed at. It had everything we needed to have a fun, comfortable, and homey stay. The cabin is about 15 minutes from the little town of Mariposa and just over an hour to Yosemite. It's so quiet and peaceful around! Avand and Danee were available for questions and showed us around the neighborhood a bit, which was lovely. If you're looking for a rural getaway with style and comfort, look no further!

From the moment we arrived, the cabin was beautiful and cozy! Everything was extremely clean and the attention to details were outstanding. We thoroughly enjoyed sitting in the backyard under the patio and in the hot tub under the stars. We loved how it was located close enough to Yosemite for multiple day trips and also so many other beautiful hikes, lakes (Bass Lake) and nature attractions. The hosts were quick to respond, and extremely friendly and helpful. You can tell how much time and thought was put into perfecting their cabin! Don't hesitate to stay here for a perfect getaway!

We had an absolutely LOVELY stay. The cabin is extremely easy to get to, and yet feels remote and relaxing. It was sparkling clean when we arrived, and I was impressed by the stylish furniture. The bed was SO comfortable, and the kitchen was well stocked: we cooked several communal meals and had everything we needed. I also LOVED the hot tub, we went in several times during the few days we stayed. I know you can drive to Yosemite from here, but honestly we were seeking maximum relaxation. We didn't go anywhere (except into town for lunch one day and to take a hike nearby) and that was exactly what we wanted. I truly hope I can return soon!
